title: Just a bit better
description: Jabb is a Quality of Life & graphical improvement mod pack.
body:
![Jabb title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f4fdee27b8c0e0cb4db432cc8ca10c44e09fdc9.png)

Just a Bit Better (Jabb) is a carefully curated modpack designed to enhance your Minecraft experience with quality-of-life improvements, graphical enhancements, and performance optimizations. Whether you're a seasoned player or new to the game, Jabb offers a seamless and immersive adventure without losing the vanilla feeling of the game.

![xp bar div](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbc9043fdddceb09898d71f146528e99c3d18b16.png)

**KEY FEATURES:**

Visual Enhancements: Experience a more vibrant world with mods like Fresh Animations for smoother entity movements, Iris Shaders for advanced lighting effects, and Inventory Blur for a sleek UI appearance.​

Performance Boosts: Enjoy smoother gameplay with Sodium for rendering optimization, Lithium for improved game logic performance, and FerriteCore to reduce memory usage.​

User Interface Improvements: Enhance your HUD with Jade for detailed tooltips, AppleSkin to monitor hunger and saturation, and Shulker Box Tooltip for quick inventory previews.​

Quality of Life Tweaks: Streamline your gameplay with Mouse Tweaks for better inventory management, Clumps to reduce XP lag, and FastQuit for quicker game exits.​

Immersive Audio: Dive into a richer soundscape with Sound Physics Remastered, adding realistic acoustics to your environment.​

Multiplayer Ready: Communicate effortlessly with friends using Simple Voice Chat, ensuring seamless coordination during your adventures.​

![xp bar div](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbc9043fdddceb09898d71f146528e99c3d18b16.png)

**HOW TO INSTALL:**
- Download the Modrinth App: Modrinth App
- Search for "Just a Bit Better": Locate the modpack within the app.
- Click Install: Let the app handle the setup for you.
- Launch and Configure: Run the game, adjust settings/keybinds as desired, and embark on your enhanced Minecraft journey!​

Alternatively, you can directly download the modpack from the top right corner of the Modrinth page.​

![xp bar div](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cbc9043fdddceb09898d71f146528e99c3d18b16.png)

Recommended to use at least 8GB of RAM if you're planning to run Flashback
**IMPORTANT:** To render in Flashback you need to disable Essential due to an incompatibility. If you're not using anything from the Essential mod you could disable it entirely yourself.
